title: ROPE validation report
description: Output shape of running a validation-suite.schema.json document against a model. Deliberately generic: each result is just {id, kind, output}, where output is whatever that kind's function returned — any JSON-serializable value, no shape shared across kinds.

output.description: Whatever the kind's function returned. No shape is imposed or shared across kinds — e.g. a plot-only kind might return {"plots": [...]}, a metric kind might return {"value":..., "unit":..., "passed":...}. A dict output containing "passed": false is treated as a check failure by CLI tooling; everything else is informational only.

suite_content_version.description: Copied from the content_version of the validation-suite document that was run. Compared against a manifest's validation.suite_content_version to detect staleness.
